articles.description:
Burger King partners with the upcoming The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants to launch its new, limited-time SpongeBob Menu.

The new menu includes:
-SpongeBob's Krabby Whopper ($8.29 near me) - A quarter-pound flame-grilled beef patty, served on a yellow square bun (the color comes from a spice) with  American cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, onions, mayo, and ketchup (i.e., it's a regular Whopper with a yellow square bun for 30 cents more).
- Mr. Krabs' Cheesy Bacon Tots ($2.89 for four near me) - Breaded and fried coin-shaped tots filled with gooey cheese, bacon bits, and potatoes. They're served in a SpongeBob-themed treasure chest carton. These seem very similar or identical to the Bacon Cheesy Tots that Burger King once offered, only with a SpongeBob treatment.
- Patrick's S…
articles.title: Burger King Launches New SpongeBob Menu

articles.description:
Applebee's adds the new Sizzlin' Cookie Dough Pie to its menu for the 2025 holiday season.

The new dessert is priced at $6.99 and features chocolate chip cookie dough served in a warm skillet, topped with vanilla ice cream and a caramel drizzle.
Other Sizzlin' desserts offered by the casual dining chain include the Sizzlin' Caramel Apple Pie and Sizzlin' Butter Pecan Blondie.
Also here for the holiday season are $6 Sleigh Bell Sips and Shake'N Up Your Holiday Cocktails.
The Sleigh Bell Sips include:
- $6 Tipsy Reindeer - A holiday punch featuring Smirnoff Vodka, Ocean Spray Cranberry, grenadine, and premium lemon sour, topped with a Santa gummy.
- New $6 Sleigh All Day Rita - A margarita featuring Teremana Tequila Blanco, blue curaçao, melon liqueur, lime, and pineapple juice, topped with a Santa gummy.
Shake’N Up Your Holiday Cocktails are served in a chilled shaker tin for multiple pours. They include:
- New Espres-So Happy Martini - Tito's Handmade Vodka, Kahlúa and Owen's Nitro-Infused Espresso served with a Pocky Chocolate biscuit.
- New Golden Goose - Grey Goose Vodka, triple sec, mango, and premium lemon sour.
- New Perfect Cranberry Margarita - A margarita featuring 1800 Reposado Tequila, Grand Marnier, Cointreau, lime, and Ocean Spray Cranberry.
Photo via Applebee's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Applebee's Introduces New Sizzlin' Cookie Dough Pie

articles.description:
Shake Shack is offering a series of deals throughout December, starting with a free Big Shack with a purchase of $10 or more through December 7, 2025.

The Big Shack (pictured) is the chain's latest limited-time burger. It's a riff on a Big Mac that features two quarter-pound Angus beef patties, secret sauce, green leaf lettuce, two slices of American cheese, Roma tomatoes, thick-cut pickles, and onions, on three buttered and toasted potato buns for $9.99 (which makes the deal essentially a BOGO).
The free Big Shack deal is redeemable when placing an order, using the code "SHACKCHEER", at an in-restaurant kiosk, on the Shake Shack website, or on the Shake Shack mobile app.
Other "free menu item with a $10 minimum purchase" deals coming up this month include:


12/8/25 to 12/14/25 - Free SmokeShack burger.
12/15/25 to 12/20/25 - Free Chicken Shack sandwich.
12/21/25 to 12/31/25 - Free ShackBurger.


The same code applies to all the deals.
You can find other deals at Shake Shack on the "deals & specials" page.
Photo via Shake Shack.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Shake Shack Offers Free Big Shack with $10 Purchase Through December 7, 2025 and More

articles.description:
The 24 Days of Jackmas promotion is back at Jack in the Box and features a different deal for each day of the week leading up to Christmas.

The promotion is exclusively for Jack Pack loyalty members, and here's what the lineup looks like:


Monday - Buy one, get one for $1 Breakfast Jack.
Tuesday - Two Tacos for $0.99.
Wednesday- Buy one, get one for $1 Jr. Chicken Sandwich.
Thursday - Free Onion Rings with a $2 minimum order.
Friday - Buy one, get one for $1 Jr. Cheeseburger.
Saturday - Free 4-pc Chicken Nuggets with a $2 minimum order.
Sunday - Buy one, get one 50% off Build Your Own Munchie Meal.


You can find the deals in the "offers" tab of the Jack in the Box mobile app.
Photo via Jack in the Box.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jack in the Box Reveals "24 Days of Jackmas" Deal Schedule

articles.description:
Crumbl welcomes the 2025 holiday season with two new desserts for this week's lineup: the Holiday Tree Cake and Sticky Toffee Pudding.

Here's what the Crumbl dessert menu looks like for the week ending December 6, 2025:
- New Holiday Tree Cake (pictured) - A square of vanilla sheet cake topped with a white drop buttercream, garland-inspired red stripes, and a sprinkle of green sugar crystals.
- New Sticky Toffee Pudding - A warm brown sugar cake topped with a toffee glaze, a dollop of vanilla bean whipped cream, and a drizzle of toffee glaze.
- Snickerdoodle Sandwich Cookie - Two chilled snickerdoodle cookies sandwiching a layer of vanilla cream cheese frosting, topped with a white drizzle and cinnamon sugar.
- Sea Salt Toffee Skillet Cookie - A warm, gooey toffee cookie topped with a scoop of vanilla bean mousse, a drizzle of milk chocolate, a drizzle of caramel, crunchy toffee pieces, and flaky sea salt.
- Brownie Batter Cookie - A warm chocolate cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chips and topped with brownie batter.
- Raspberry Cheesecake Cookie - A chilled, buttery graham cracker cookie topped with vanilla cheesecake frosting and a tangy raspberry topping.
- Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips.
In addition to the pies, Crumbl offers a "Secret Menu" where each location selects a flavor to offer (including test flavors). You can find out what's available near you by checking the Crumbl mobile app or website.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Holiday Tree Cake and Sticky Toffee Pudding Through December 6, 2025

articles.description:
Domino's is offering a limited-time deal where you can get 50% off the regular menu price of all pizzas ordered online through December 7, 2025.

The deal is a nice option if you prefer something other than the 1- and 2-topping pizza deals the pizza chain normally offers.
For reference, here are the discounted prices for several popular pizza orders from my local Domino's in Los Angeles:


Large Cheese Pizza - $8.50
Large 1-Topping Pizza - $9.75

Large 3-Topping Pizza - $12.25

Photo via Domino's.

articles.title: Domino's Offers 50% Off Pizzas Through December 7, 2025

articles.description:
Insomnia Cookies bakes a trio of cookies for the 2025 holiday season. They include the new Holiday Munchie Mix, Salted Maple, and Jinglebread cookies.

Here's what you can expect from the cookies.
- New Holiday Munchie Mix cookie - A war, brown sugar cookie packed with chocolate-covered pretzel bits, chocolate chunks, marshmallows and red and green M&M's.
- Salted Maple cookie - A warm, maple brown sugar cookie with white creme and caramel chips, sprinkled with flaky salt.
- Jinglebread cookie - A warm, gingerbread cookie sprinkled with sugar crystals.
Prices vary, but the cookies go for $3.69 a piece here in Los Angeles.
The chain will be adding to its holiday menu in early December with two more seasonal cookies.
On National Cookie Day, December 4, 2025, the Snowball Classic cookie arrives. It's a sugar cookie stuffed with vanilla buttercream and topped with powdered sugar and edible glitter (to sparkle like snow). In celebration of the occasion, the first 100 Insomnia Rewards members who visit any participating US location will nab one Snowball Classic cookie for free.
Then on December 9, 2025, the chain rolls out the Candy Cane Classic, a brown sugar cookie packed with peppermint pieces and white chips.
Photo via Insomnia Cookies.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Insomnia Cookies Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu

articles.description:
Wendy's is "making Black Friday a little bit sweeter" by offering a 67-cent small Frosty deal (a nod to the viral "6-7" meme) all day on Friday, November 28, 2025.

The deal is available through the Wendy's mobile app or website and in-restaurant on November 28, 2025 at participating locations nationwide. Then, from November 29 through December 7, 2025, it will only be available through the Wendy's app or website. It is limited to one discounted Frosty per order.
Frosty prices vary, but a small Frosty normally costs $2.79 at my local Wendy's here in Los Angeles.
Photo via Wendy's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Wendy's Offers 67-Cent Small Frosty for Black Friday

articles.description:
Jimmy John's introduces the new Holiday Magic Cookie as its seasonal dessert for the 2025 holiday season.

Available now for a limited time, the Holiday Magic Cookie is a soft, chewy sugar cookie packed with red and green Milk Chocolate M&M's, topped with a winter sprinkle mix.
Cookie prices vary, but it costs $3.49 at the nearest Jimmy John's here in Los Angeles. That's the same price as the chain's other cookies and its brownie.
In celebration of National Cookie Day on December 4, 2026, Jimmy John's will be offering a free Holiday Magic Cookie with any digital purchase (through the Jimmy John's website or mobile app) of $5 or more.
Photo via Jimmy John's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jimmy John's Debuts New Holiday Magic Cookie

articles.description:
Starbucks cafes in Target stores get an exclusive holiday drink: the new Frozen Peppermint Hot Chocolate.

Available now for a limited time at participating Target stores nationwide, the festive drink features a creme Frappuccino blended with mocha sauce, milk, and ice, poured over a layer of peppermint-flavored whipped cream with red and green sprinkles. The drink is then topped with more peppermint-flavored whipped cream and more red and green sprinkles.
Photo via Starbucks.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Starbucks' New Frozen Peppermint Hot Chocolate is Exclusive to Target

articles.description:
Cold Stone Creamery welcomes its 2025 holiday menu, which introduces two holiday-themed Creations and two holiday-inspired ice cream cakes.

Here's what you'll find on this year's menu:
- New Holiday Spice and Everything Nice Creation -  Frosted Gingerbread Ice Cream folded with ginger snaps, vanilla icing, and holiday sprinkles. 
- S'more Moose Tracks, Please! Creation - Marshmallow Ice Cream made with Moose Tracks Fudge mixed with graham cracker pie crust, marshmallows, and more Moose Tracks Fudge.
- Iced & Spiced Cake - Yellow cake, Frosted Gingerbread Ice Cream, ginger snaps, and holiday sprinkles, covered in white frosting. 
- Layer on the Moose Tracks Fudge Cake - Devil's food cake and Marshmallow Ice Cream made with Moose Tracks Fudge, wrapped in white frosting.
Cold Stone's 2025 holiday menu is available now for a limited time through January 6, 2026.
Photo via Cold Stone Creamery.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Cold Stone Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu

articles.description:
Popeyes partners with the upcoming horror movie, Five Nights at Freddy's 2, to launch its new, limited-time Freddy Fazbear Crunch Menu at participating locations nationwide.

Inspired by the Chuck E. Cheese-like Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria (where a bulk of the movie takes place), the new menu includes:
- Freddy Fazbear Deluxe Box - Priced at $12.99 (may vary), the combo meal includes three classic or spicy fried chicken tenders topped with a garlic parmesan rub, served with new garlic-crusted Cheesy Bites, marinara dipping sauce, a new Cupcake Cup, and a fountain drink.
- Freddy Fazbear Box - For $7.99 (may vary), the meal includes three classic or spicy fried chicken tenders topped with a garlic parmesan rub, served with garlic-crusted Cheesy Bites and marinara dipping sauce.
- Cheesy Bites with Marinara Sauce ($3.99): Lightly breaded, garlic-crusted, and fried cheese curds made with white cheddar cheese. They're priced at $3.99 (may vary) and come with marinara sauce for dipping.
- Cupcake Cup - Priced at $3.99 (may vary), it's a small strawberry-flavored cake topped with pink icing.
In addition to the new menu, Popeyes has exclusive collectible sticker packs featuring the film's supernatural animatronics at select Popeyes restaurants nationwide in limited quantities.
Photo via Popeyes.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Popeyes Debuts New Five Nights at Freddy's Menu

articles.description:
Little Caesars is once again offering a limited-time, online-only deal where you can get a large, two-topping round pizza for $5.99 at participating locations nationwide.

Prices vary, but a large, 2-topping pizza is normally about $10 at Little Caesars.
Photo via Little Caesars.
